plugins.name: Plugin Hub
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Browse, install, and toggle Paralives mods from inside the game. Auto-updates itself and your installed mods on each launch — no manual file copying after the first install. Also fixes the Steam-offline boot hang so the game launches without internet. v1.0.17: 25 bug fixes — atomic DLL writes, uninstall/auto-update loop fixes, manifest parser improvements, listener leak fix, and more.

plugins.name: Not Enough Workshop Mods
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Stops the game from deleting your Steam Workshop mods. On a Steam hiccup at launch the game can wipe ALL your locally-installed workshop mods at once — this makes that impossible: mods are only ever removed against a complete, confirmed subscription list, never on a failed, empty, or timed-out one, and it retries quietly in the background until Steam responds. A second independent safety net blocks any mass-delete even if a future game update breaks the main fix. Mods that fail to load show a red (Skipped) / amber (Partial) tag in My Mods instead of vanishing silently. Updated for game v0.1.3. Cross-platform (Windows/Mac/Linux/Steam Deck).

plugins.name: FixMyReimport
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Keeps your game from getting stuck on the loading screen. If a mod won't load, gets the game stuck on the 'Reimporting Assets' screen, or a save is damaged, your game no longer freezes — it either skips the bad part and keeps going, or, if a load truly can't finish, brings you back to the main menu with a Retry button instead of leaving you stuck. Even with a big pile of mods where several are broken, your game still starts and loads all the good ones, and notes which one caused the trouble. Broken mods are tried again next launch, so a one-time hiccup (like a mod still downloading) isn't switched off for good. Updated for game v0.1.3.

plugins.name: Menu FPS Limiter
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Stops your fans screaming while the menu sits at 200+ fps doing nothing. Caps menu to 60fps, drops to 10fps when alt-tabbed, 3fps when minimized. Gameplay runs uncapped. All thresholds configurable.

plugins.name: Stats Overlay
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Unity-Editor-style stats panel — FPS, CPU/render times, draw calls, triangles, audio level, animation counts. Top-left overlay. Press F3 to toggle.

plugins.name: What Is My Loading Doing
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Shows you what the game is actually doing on the loading screen — like 'Loading furniture (142/300)', 'Loading characters', or 'Building terrain' — instead of just a spinning icon. If a load ever gets stuck, it tells you exactly which Workshop item caused it, so you know what to remove.
